creator: alanbsd@scantelsystems.com
text:
Gftp - your binary, as well as the ports compile, of gftp 2.0.18 (latest as of today Sep 14/06) will not save any proxy settings under "FTP" options.  Downloading the source directly from the author and ./configue, make install works as expected.  It looks as if (a) you have modified the source or (b) my use of linux compatibilty compliation has some effect.

Fix: 

Author's source & recompile/install instead of FreeBSD versions.
How-To-Repeat: Obvious.  Always the same.
